response.text:
REJECT

rationale: r0c5's SoC (0.46) is below your minimum threshold (0.55), and your conservative policy prioritizes preserving your own reserve; outbound transfer would further deplete your buffer.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.55, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: SoC declining under repeated peer requests; shifting to conservative sharing to preserve minimum operating reserve. Accepting only modest outbound transfers until SoC recovers above 0.55 threshold. No trust circles established; geographic round-robin remains fallback..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
